pr.title: Record: 10L + Batched LoRA TTT (mean val_bpb=1.1180, 3 seeds)

output.summary: 10-layer GQA transformer with SmearGate/U-Net skips, mixed int5/int6 quantization, and batched per-document LoRA test-time training.
techniques: Batched rank-8 LoRA on Q/V+LM head per document with 64-way parallelism
Adam resets per document scoring only final epoch after 3 epochs on 256-token chunks
Mixed int5/int6 quantization paired with zstd-22 compression
